steps: Complete single cell or nuclei isolation and 10x fixation prior to starting this protocol

The protocol follwed for the library preparation can be referred to the link: https://cdn.10xgenomics.com/image/upload/v1725314293/support-documents/CG000731_ChromiumGEM-X_SingleCell3v4_UserGuide_RevB.pdf
